scripts.fuzz:frontmatter: npm run fuzz:build && mkdir -p fuzz/crashes && jazzer fuzz/dist/fuzz/frontmatter.fuzz.js fuzz/corpus/frontmatter --sync -- -max_total_time=60 -artifact_prefix=fuzz/crashes/frontmatter-
scripts.fuzz:docxInline: npm run fuzz:build && mkdir -p fuzz/crashes && jazzer fuzz/dist/fuzz/docxInline.fuzz.js fuzz/corpus/docxInline -- -max_total_time=60 -artifact_prefix=fuzz/crashes/docxInline-
scripts.fuzz: npm run fuzz:frontmatter && npm run fuzz:docxInline
